column5: Rounded and sub-rounded COBBLES, GRAVEL and CONCRETE. No recovery, assumed finer material washed out. (FILL)
Rounded and sub-rounded COBBLES and fine to medium GRAVEL. Some fine material, possible residual soil in lower part. Recovery, assumed finer material washed out. (FILL)

Moderately weak, brownish grey spotted yellow, highly decomposed, weathered, dark GRAY GRANITE, extremely closely spaced, interlocking, narrow, very narrow undulating, limonite and manganese veining, dipping 50-60 degrees. Moderately strong, brownish grey spotted yellow, highly decomposed, medium grained Granodiorite, extremely closely spaced, narrow to very narrow undulating joints, and manganese stained joints, dipping 5-10 degrees and 15-35 degrees.
